author: Nick Smith
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Academic year planner for teachers — timetable management, lesson tracking, and weekly planning.

manifest.description: Academic year planner for teachers — timetable management, lesson tracking, and weekly planning.
manifest.name: Teacher Planner

name: Teacher Planner

releases.author: NSDerred
releases.description:
- Fixes event chips throwing "getEventPlan is not defined" (missing import) on click — events can be clicked and edited again.

- Adaptive hover: the hover card now fits its content exactly — no more blank space below short chips; block footprint kept as the hover hit-area so nothing flickers.

- svelte-check + npm run verify pipeline: .svelte files are now fully type-checked (how the missing import escaped); all 40 latent type errors fixed.

- Last three window.confirm() → ConfirmModal (bulk apply, undo, delete template); fixed "Save Timetable" passing the MouseEvent as the force flag, bypassing the past-week warning.

- Bot-audit zero pass: no innerHTML, console.log, or any-casts remain; carries the earlier zero-warning work (typing, deprecations, a11y, release CI).
releases.name: 0.2.3: fix unclickable event chips, adaptive hover cards, svelte-check gate

releases.author: NSDerred
releases.description:
Feature release. Highlights:

- Calendar (.ics) export: new iCal format in the export modal alongside
  Excel/CSV — import your timetable into Google/Apple/Outlook calendar.
  Content toggles (lessons, date events, holidays & INSET as all-day,
  breaks & registration), Mon–Sun day selector, and a from/to date range
  defaulting to today → year end. Dependency-free RFC 5545 generator that
  resolves A/B rotation, template changes, holidays, slot exclusions and
  moved lessons exactly as the week view does.

- Day schedules: days can have different period structures (sports
  afternoons, half-day Saturdays). New DaySchedule model with automatic
  migration; manage schedules and assign days in Settings → School
  Timetable or directly in wizard Step 7. iCal export and directed time
  resolve periods per day.

- Time-axis week view: complete redesign — time gutter with hour lines,
  each day column independently shaped by its schedule, period blocks
  positioned by real times with lesson/event chips inside, gapped column
  layout with hairline block borders, column-level holiday/INSET shading,
  now-line on the axis. All interactions preserved (drag-drop with
  invalid-drop rejection, chip menus, lesson notes, A/B badges).

- Setup wizard: day-schedule editing in Step 7 (create/rename/delete,
  day pills, per-schedule periods); rename/new dialogs use a proper modal
  (window.prompt is disabled in Obsidian).

- Fixes: delete-planner save race; real calendar-date validation; period
  start<end validation; overlapping holiday/INSET detection; emoji picker
  listener leak; drag-reject flash; period name no longer crushed by the
  time label on narrow panes.

- Docs: README rewritten with new screenshots and full-length GIF demos;
  CHANGELOG 0.2.0 section.

Full details in CHANGELOG.md.
releases.name: 0.2.0 — iCal export, day schedules, time-axis week view

releases.author: NSDerred
releases.description:
Settings — School Timetable
- Sort periods by start time on every render so the editor always
  displays them in chronological order, regardless of how they were
  entered or imported. Reordering persists on save.

Setup Wizard — School periods (Step 7)
- Add a block-type dropdown to each period row, populated from the
  block types defined earlier in the wizard. New periods default to
  the first defined block type instead of a hardcoded "lesson".

Setup Wizard — Clear all
- Add a confirm-guarded "Clear all" button to both the Holidays & INSET
  step (Step 4) and the School periods step (Step 7).

Setup Wizard — default holiday labels
- Rename default holidays: "Christmas" → "Winter Break",
  "Easter" → "Spring Break".

Settings — Edit active planner (new)
- Add an "Edit" button to the active planner card opening a new
  EditPlannerModal (src/modals/EditPlannerModal.ts) to change the
  planner name and academic-year start/end dates after creation.
- On save, timetable templates shift by the same day-delta as the
  start date so the timetable and A/B week rotation realign to the
  corrected range. Independent dated content (holidays, INSET, date
  events, slot exclusions, week notes, lesson-note files) is left
  untouched. Validates date format and ordering; active planner only.

Also repaired truncated tails in SettingsTab.ts and SetupWizardModal.ts
that were preventing the build.
releases.name: Editable planner dates, wizard improvements, timetable sort fix
